text: Hey, I was just wondering about that thing you guys offer but can't find the details anywhere. Can you tell me more about it?

I tried changing my email linked to my account since I no longer have access to the old one, but the system keeps saying my email is already associated with another account. This doesn't make sense because I only have one account. Can you help me figure out how to resolve this without locking me out completely?
I'm trying to connect the API but it keeps saying invalid token. I’m sure it’s the right one tho.

I recently attempted to log into my account, but I'm facing issues since I can't remember my password. Additionally, I think the email linked to my account might be outdated, but I'm not entirely sure. Could you help me with these problems? It's quite frustrating not being able to access my account and I need it resolved soon.
I am curious to know if there are any educational discounts available for your services, and also whether I can use my previous subscription for any current offers.

I am quite dissatisfied with the service I received recently. I expected a much smoother experience, and I don't understand why my issue was not resolved. I thought it was going to be quick and easy, but it turned out to be quite the opposite. Could you please explain how this discrepancy happened?

I am writing to formally request a refund for an item that was not delivered as promised. The order was placed on September 15, but despite several assurances, it has yet to arrive. Please let me know the necessary steps to process this refund promptly.
I'm really confused about your service! Can you tell me what all the plans include? I feel like there's so much information missing from the website.
Is your premium plan actually cheaper than the basic one? Sounds odd.

I've been trying to connect to the API for days, and honestly, it's so frustrating! Like, I have this cat named Whiskers who keeps jumping on my keyboard while I'm waiting for a response. It's like he knows! But back to the issue, I really need to understand if there’s a known problem with the API right now. Sometimes, it just doesn’t respond, but I can’t tell if it’s my internet or your service being down. Also, what's up with those error codes? They seem so random! It would be great if someone could clarify this soon, as my project is kinda in limbo here.
Hey, I need my money back for the order I placed. The item never showed up, and it's been days.

I’m having a bit of a problem trying to figure out the rate limit on the API. It says one thing in the docs, but in practice, it seems like I’m getting throttled despite being under what I thought was the limit. Can someone clarify? Also, there are some typos in the documentation that make it hard to follow.

I was wondering if you could give me a clearer understanding of what exactly your service offers, particularly in terms of the features that I might be omitting in my current plan, because, you know, it's not very clear on your website. Also, is there a way to know if I am eligable for any promotional upgrades without having to dig through all the terms and conditions? Just thought it might help...if I had clearer answers.

I received my order yesterday, but I'm confused. I definitely ordered two items, yet there's only one in the package. Can you sort this out? I want my money back for the one that was missing, even though I really liked the one I got.
Wait, do I pay each month for the service or just once? I thought it was yearly. But now I'm confused.
I received one item but I don't want a reship. Just give me my money back.
